bugs.title: Mobile mega menu opens from wrong state / inconsistent top position
bugs.reproduce: Open header menu on mobile, open Sklep submenu, close, reopen after scroll/back.
bugs.root_cause: Mixed breakpoints and mobile submenu state handling in JS/CSS.
bugs.fix: JS breakpoint normalization to 1024 and overlay-state unification for menu/search/cart paths

bugs.title: Sticky header proportions/buttons look uneven on mobile
bugs.reproduce: Load page on 320/360/390/430 and compare burger/search/account/cart geometry.
bugs.root_cause: Per-breakpoint button sizes 34/36/40/44 and icon-size divergence.
bugs.fix: Header button geometry normalized to 44x44 across narrow breakpoints, tokens updated to 56/48, critical CSS aligned

bugs.title: Sticky PDP CTA can be dishonest (label vs action)
bugs.reproduce: On PDP tap sticky CTA after scrolling and after reopen.
bugs.root_cause: Needs explicit hostile retest against add-to-cart behavior under overlays.
bugs.fix: No runtime CTA logic change in this pass; requires hostile PDP flow retest post-deploy

bugs.title: Mobile search is not fully aligned with desktop interaction language
bugs.reproduce: Compare first open/second open/close behavior and focus management mobile vs desktop.
bugs.root_cause: Split implementation (dropdown vs panel) and 1025-based JS branching.
bugs.fix: Search state branching aligned to DESKTOP_MIN=1024; panel/dropdown logic unified at boundary

bugs.title: Cart mobile visual hierarchy is unstable
bugs.reproduce: Open header cart on small viewports and inspect icon/badge/readability.
bugs.root_cause: Badge hidden at <=600 and trigger geometry varies by breakpoint.
bugs.fix: Cart badge remains visible <=600 with compact size; cart trigger geometry normalized to 44x44
